data.title: WARNER MUSIC GROUP NAMED TO TIME'S LIST OF THE TIME100 MOST INFLUENTIAL COMPANIES
data.description: Warner Music Group (NASDAQ: WMG) has been acknowledged for its dedication to supporting artists and songwriters during the age of artificial intelligence. The company has been placed on the prestigious TIME100 Most Influential Companies list for the sixth consecutive year. This recognition highlights the significant global impact made by WMG in championing creative talent.

data.title: Roon Launches The First Knowledge Network Built By Physicians For Physicians
data.description: In New York, an AI native community called Roon has been launched for physicians to connect, share medical expertise, and influence the medical field. This network, exclusively created by doctors for doctors, aims to address the lack of physician-focused online platforms. Roon provides a secure space for physicians globally to collaborate, exchange knowledge, and engage in discussions on new research, thereby enhancing medical practices worldwide.

data.title: Intel's 115% Stock Boom Is Shattering Records After Years Of Doubt
data.description: Intel Corp. (INTC) is wrapping up April with an unprecedented monthly rally, showcasing a remarkable comeback for a company previously underestimated in the field of artificial intelligence. At the close of March, INTC stock was valued at $44.13, but as of Wednesday, it has surged to $94.75. This marks a substantial 115% increase, positioning Intel to achieve a historical performance in April and presenting one of the most notable turnarounds in the realm of large-cap technology. Notably, President Donald Trump has benefited from this rally through a governmental investment made last summer, resulting in a reported $30 billion profit generated from federal holdings in Intel over recent months. Trump highlighted this success on Wednesday, emphasizing his role in securing substantial returns for the United States. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: SoftBank Eyes 2026 IPO For New AI-Robotics Venture, Targets Up To $100 Billion Valuation: Report
data.description: SoftBank Group Corp. is launching a new venture called Roze AI, which will focus on artificial intelligence (AI) and robotics. The company plans to take Roze AI public potentially by the second half of 2026. The goal of Roze AI is to enhance the efficiency of AI infrastructure development by incorporating autonomous robotics in data center construction. SoftBank will merge some of its existing investments in energy, land, and infrastructure into this venture. Reports suggest SoftBank is eyeing a valuation of up to $100 billion for Roze AI. Typically, SoftBank maintains majority control over its ventures, as demonstrated by its approximate 90% ownership of Arm Holdings. However, there are concerns among some insiders at SoftBank regarding the projected valuation and IPO timeline. The company is set to hold an analyst day to provide more details on this initiative.
Millicom (Tigo) to announce Q1 2026 results in upcoming video conference.

data.title: Royal Caribbean Delivers Profit Surprise, Stock Climbs As Demand Holds Strong
data.description: Royal Caribbean Group, a leading cruise company listed on the NYSE under RCL, disclosed its first-quarter earnings report on Thursday. The company posted an EPS of $3.48 and an adjusted EPS of $3.60, surpassing the estimated $3.19. Total sales amounted to $4.452 billion, slightly lower than the expected $4.460 billion. Revenue saw an 11% annual increase, totaling $4.5 billion due to sustained demand for its vacation offerings. Following the announcement, the company's shares experienced an uptick in trading. Net income ascended to $900 million from $700 million the previous year, with adjusted net income hitting $1.0 billion. Adjusted EBITDA stood at $1.7 billion. The company's capacity grew by 8%, accommodating 2.5 million guests, a 12% increase, resulting in a load factor of 109%. Gross Margin Yields rose by 6.9%, while Net Yields increased by 3.6% reported and 2% in constant currency. Notably, fuel costs remained a primary expenditure, with bunker pricing during the first quarter at $613 per metric ton.

data.title: PagSeguro Files its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the Fiscal Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: On April 30, 2026, PagSeguro Digital Ltd. (NYSE: PAGS) disclosed the submission of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). The report can be accessed on the SEC's official website at www.sec.gov and on PagSeguro's Investor Relations website at https://investors.pagbank.com/. Shareholders can request copies of the Annual Report on Form 20-F, containing audited financial statements, from PagSeguro's Investor Relations Department free of charge within a reasonable time frame. PagSeguro Digital Ltd. is a leading financial technology solutions provider. For additional details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: From Tel Aviv to Austin: 5W Research Documents 80+ Israeli Technology Companies Establishing U.S. Operations in Texas Since 2020 -- Cybersecurity, AI, Defense, and Energy Categories Lead the Migration
data.description: 5W's latest research unveils the initial comprehensive map of Israeli tech migration to Texas, showcasing companies like Wiz, SentinelOne, Pagaya, Salt Security, and Hippo as they set up U.S. bases in Austin, Dallas, and Houston. The report, out of New York on April 30, 2026, marks a significant milestone in tracking this trend.

data.title: Synchrony Expands Partnership with Lowe's as New Issuer of Co-Brand Credit Card for Home Improvement Professionals
data.description: A new credit card, MyLowe's Pro Rewards American Express® Card, has been launched today to assist professional customers in maximizing rewards and savings at Lowe's and on everyday business transactions. The card is provided by Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a prominent consumer financing company. The release was announced in Stamford, Conn., on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Benjamin Moore Announces Two New Subsidiaries Poised to Grow Global Markets
data.description: Montvale, New Jersey-based Benjamin Moore, a leading brand in high-quality paint and coatings with over 140 years of experience, has revealed the launch of two new wholly owned subsidiaries - BM Prudhoe Limited and C&R Scotland Limited. These entities, situated in England and Scotland, represent the company's continued growth in the UK and globally. This move signifies Benjamin Moore's second subsidiary in England and its inaugural subsidiary in Scotland. The introduction of these subsidiaries further solidifies the company's foothold in international markets.

data.title: Ingles Markets Announces Preliminary Voting Results from 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: As per the recent announcement by Ingles Markets, Incorporated, two new Class A directors, Dwight Jacobs and Rory Held, were elected at the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. Additionally, Fred D. Ayers, Robert P. Ingle II, Patricia E. Jackson, James W. Lanning, Laura Ingle Sharp, and Brenda S. Tudor were elected as Class B directors. Shareholders also approved the compensation plans in an advisory vote. Ingles Markets is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol IMKTA.

data.title: StarTech.com Launches Industry-First USB4 Dock with Driverless Dual Display for Mac, Windows, and Linux
data.description: In London, ON, as of April 30, 2026, StarTech.com, a leading worldwide supplier of high-performance connectivity products for IT professionals, has introduced the Driverless Dual 4K USB4 Universal Docking Station (208N-USB4-DOCK). This groundbreaking product sets a new industry standard by offering driverless connectivity.
